sourceNotes: Popular confidence pass 2026-06-02: Visit Thessaly supports Papakosta in the Larissa beach sequence and parking above the canteen; LarissaPress supports the Papakosta identity, sandy one-kilometer beach, forest setting, easy road access from Agiokampos toward Sklithro, canteen, parking/camper-van space and seasonal loungers/umbrellas. Source wording about calm/clear water was not imported as static truth. Confidence promoted to high; windProfile, scoring, coordinates and photos were not changed.

Thessaly re-geocoding 2026-06-11 (batch-approved): coordinates moved 13.48 km from the imported village/POI point to the OSM-mapped beach (https://www.openstreetmap.org/way/166987866, name "Παραλία Παπακώστα", match score 1, coastal-verified on the osmdata 2026-06-10 land mask). accessNotes.en: I Panagia einai mikri apomonomeni akti sti diadromi Stomio - Kokkino Nero. Oi piges ti dinoun os evkoli enallaktiki gia banio, me pithani syntomi kathodo apo ton paraliako dromo.
accessNotes.gr: Η Παναγία είναι μικρή απομονωμένη ακτή στη διαδρομή Στόμιο - Κόκκινο Νερό. Οι πηγές τη δίνουν ως εύκολη εναλλακτική για μπάνιο, με πιθανή σύντομη κάθοδο από τον παραλιακό δρόμο.

sourceNotes: Popular-beach evidence pass 2026-06-02: Visit Thessaly and Larissa-beach support the Larissa coastline context and Panagia listing, while Amadeo and Wikiloc give direct Panagia/Kokkino Nero-area evidence for rocky/large-stone terrain, plane-tree shade and easy route context. Promoted to high and corrected terrain/services conservatively. No wind profile, scoring, photos, or live-condition claims were changed.

sourceNotes: Popular regions source pass 2026-06-02: Visit Thessaly supports Stomio as a popular seaside settlement with shallow water, tavernas, cafe-bars and sea-sport context. The official bathing-water profile supports sandy shore/seabed, shallow first meters, asphalt access, organized section, changing rooms, showers, umbrellas/sunbeds, snack/food kiosks, beach volleyball and lifeguard staff. Coordinates, windProfile, scoring, photos, and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

Thessaly re-geocoding 2026-06-11 (batch-approved): coordinates moved 5.81 km from the imported village/POI point to the OSM-mapped beach (https://www.openstreetmap.org/way/321476849, name "Παραλία Στομίου", match score 1, coastal-verified on the osmdata 2026-06-10 land mask). Previous pin: 39.838,22.682. Only coordinates changed; windProfile, scoring, photos and live claims untouched.
